post.description:
UserRiskAccount Create, available on this page https://demo.centroidsol.com/broker/user
**access_type** controls which access permissions are granted at creation time:
- `ui` (default) — UI access only; REST API access is not enabled
- `api` — enables `ACCESS_V1_REST_API` only; UI access is not enabled
- `both` — enables both `ACCESS_V1_UI` and `ACCESS_V1_REST_API`

* 5 - A_HIGH_LOSS
* 6 - A_HIGH_MARGIN
* 7 - B_PERCENT (Currently Unavailable)

* 9 - B_HIGH_MARGIN

order_type.description:
Order type:
* Market - Market order
* Limit - Limit order
* Stop - Stop order

price.description: Price is required when order_type is "Limit" or "Stop"

validity.description:
Validity:
* GTC - Good till cancel.
* IOC - Immediate or cancel.
* FOK - Fill or kill.

groups.description: Groups: Corresponds to Components on UI

in_session_values.description:
* Order For Markup Models: Markup Bid, Markup Bid Var, Markup Ask, Markup Ask Var, Spread Min From, Spread Max from, Spread Max Exec
* Order For Liquidity Models: Makers(Separated by ; if more than one), Exec Mode, Filter Factor
* Order For Taker Feeds: Liquidity Model, Markup Model
* Order For Taker Execution Models: Liquidity Model, Markup Model, BBook %, BFix, BBoost, BDelay Min, BDelay Max, Gain Perc, LL Variation, LL Action

out_of_session_values.description:
* Order For Markup Models: Markup Bid, Markup Bid Var, Markup Ask, Markup Ask Var, Spread Min From, Spread Max from, Spread Max Exec
* Order For Liquidity Models: Makers(Separated by ; if more than one), Exec Mode, Filter Factor
* Order For Taker Feeds: Liquidity Model, Markup Model
* Order For Taker Execution Models: Liquidity Model, Markup Model, BBook %, BFix, BBoost, BDelay Min, BDelay Max, Gain Perc, LL Variation, LL Action

access_type.description:
AccessType controls which access permissions are granted at creation time.
Valid values: "ui" (default, UI access only), "api" (REST API access only; UI access is not enabled), "both" (UI + REST API access).

models.FeederStatusList.description: Extended information about the feeder including system context and UI labels.

agg_server.description: Aggregation server associated with this feeder

client_code.description: Unique client code assigned to this feeder or taker

host_name.description: Hostname of the server where the feeder is connected

id.description: Unique identifier for the feeder session

instance.description: Name of the application or service instance

ip.description: IP address of the connected feeder

last_ping.description: Last ping time in Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch)

received_count.description: Number of messages received from the feeder

sent_count.description: Number of messages sent to the feeder

subscription_list.description: Comma-separated list of subscribed symbols or instruments

taker.description: Name or ID of the taker (client) associated with this feeder

lp_sessions.description: LPSessions represents the default makers shown on the UI (comma-separated list of default maker names)

models.FixStatusList.description: Extended FIX session details including host info and display values.

fix_session.description: Unique identifier or label for the FIX session

host_name.description: Host machine name where the FIX session is running

inc_msg.description: Number of incoming FIX messages received

instance.description: Name of the application or instance running this FIX session

logged_in.description: Login state of the session: 0 = Not Logged in, 1 = logged in

lp_category.description: Category/type of the liquidity provider (e.g., Market Maker, ECN)

lp_server.description: Liquidity provider server name or address

name.description: Name or identifier of the FIX connection/session

out_msg.description: Number of outgoing FIX messages sent

session_type.description: Type of the FIX session (e.g., Feeding, Trading)

stime.description: Session start time in Unix timestamp

stime_value.description: Human-readable session start time (e.g. "NOT WITHIN TIME"/ "WITHIN TIME"),

taker_version.description: Version of the taker/client software using this session

makers.description: Comma-separated list of makers. Use '*' to select all.

markup_model.description: Use '*' to select all markup models.

ratio.description:
Ratio:
* 0.1 - 10% Volume Ratio,
* 0.2 - 20% Volume Ratio,
* 0.3 - 30% Volume Ratio,
* 0.4 - 40% Volume Ratio,
* 0.5 - 50% Volume Ratio,
* 0.6 - 60% Volume Ratio,
* 0.7 - 70% Volume Ratio,
* 0.8 - 80% Volume Ratio,
* 0.9 - 90% Volume Ratio,
* 1.0 - 100% Volume Ratio,
* -0.1 - 10% Volume Reverse,
* -0.2 - 20% Volume Reverse,
* -0.3 - 30% Volume Reverse,
* -0.4 - 40% Volume Reverse,
* -0.5 - 50% Volume Reverse,
* -0.6 - 60% Volume Reverse,
* -0.7 - 70% Volume Reverse,
* -0.8 - 80% Volume Reverse,
* -0.9 - 90% Volume Reverse,
* -1.0 - 100% Volume Reverse

securities.description: Comma-separated list of security identifiers. Use '*' to select all.

sides.description:
Sides:
* 0 - None,
* 1 - Buy Side,
* 2 - Sell Side

source_extgroup.description: External group of sources. Use '*' to select all.

source_extlogin.description: External login of a source. Use '*' to select all.

symbol_format.description:
SymbolFormat specifies the format of the symbol:
* Use "#ts#" for Taker symbol (e.g., "#ts#.x" for suffixed versions)
* Use "#us#" for Bridge symbol

symbols.description: Comma-separated list of symbols. Use '*' to select all.

takers.description: Comma-separated list of takers. Use '*' to select all.

tems.description: Comma-separated list of taker execution models. Use '*' to select all.

multiplier_state.description:
multiplier_state:
* Represents which multiplier is active, in a "1|0|0" format.
* Each position corresponds to multiplier_1, multiplier_2, and multiplier_3.
* Example:
    - "1|0|0" → multiplier_1 is active
    - "0|1|0" → multiplier_2 is active
    - "0|0|1" → multiplier_3 is active
* Default Value = 1|0|0

multiplier_state:
* Represents which multiplier is active, in a "1|0|0" format.
* Each position corresponds to multiplier_1, multiplier_2, and multiplier_3.
* Example:
    - "1|0|0" → multiplier_1 is active
    - "0|1|0" → multiplier_2 is active
    - "0|0|1" → multiplier_3 is active
* Default Value = 1|0|0

min_spread_exec.description:
min_spread_exec:
  * Minimum Spread Execution Mode
  * 0 - NONE
  * 1 - PASS
  * 2 - REJECT
  * 3 - ABSORB
  * 4 - INVALIDATE
  * 5 - PASS_A_ABSORB_B
  * 6 - INVALIDATE_AND_REJECT
  * Default = 3 (ABSORB)

spread_exec.description:
spread_exec:
  * Spread Execution Mode
  * 0 - NONE
  * 1 - PASS
  * 2 - REJECT
  * 3 - ABSORB
  * 4 - INVALIDATE
  * 5 - PASS_A_ABSORB_B
  * 6 - INVALIDATE_AND_REJECT
  * Default = 1 (PASS)

type.description:
type: * 0 - FIX * 5 - DROPCOPY

Note for Broker role: - PUT: Type field cannot be modified
